use_cases: Product launch countdown displays for landing pages
Event countdown timers for conference and webinar pages
Flash sale urgency indicators for e-commerce storefronts
Campaign deadline displays for marketing pages
ai_summary: A countdown timer component displaying days, hours, minutes, and seconds with monospace typography and dark mode support. Features responsive scaling across breakpoints and clean visual separation with horizontal dividers. Built with Framer Motion for potential animations and uses a custom hook for time calculation.
